message:
feat(analysis): add genomic signature PCA for alignment-free phylogenetics

- Add k-mer frequency analysis module (tetranucleotide counting)
- Implement PCA using power iteration for efficient dimensionality reduction
- Create GenomicSignaturePCAOverlay for interactive 2D visualization
- Projects all phages into PC1/PC2 space colored by GC content or genome length
- Shows top tetranucleotide loadings for biological interpretation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
